relationship_to_phase1: independent challenger using the previously unused top-trader/global positioning columns; phase1 thresholds and results may not be used to change this grid

features.top_position_z: shifted rolling-30-day z score of log(sum_toptrader_long_short_ratio)
features.top_account_z: shifted rolling-30-day z score of log(count_toptrader_long_short_ratio)
features.global_account_z: shifted rolling-30-day z score of log(count_long_short_ratio)

DELEVERAGING_REVERSAL.event: first PDH/PDL or completed Asia high/low raid and completed 15m reclaim
DELEVERAGING_REVERSAL.base_confirmation: directional body >=0.20 ATR15 and directional CLV >=0.55

NEW_POSITION_ACCEPTANCE.event: first PDH/PDL or completed Asia high/low crossing with completed 15m acceptance
NEW_POSITION_ACCEPTANCE.open_interest: oi_state >= threshold, where threshold is 0.0 or 0.5

rule_grid.reversal: level(2) x smart(2) x OI(2) x flow(2) x premium(2) = 32
rule_grid.continuation: level(2) x smart(2) x OI(2) x flow(2) x body(2) x CLV(2) x premium(2) = 128
rule_grid.adjacency: same branch and level; exactly one threshold-index step differs
rule_grid.stable_rule: passes unchanged development/internal-validation gates and has a passing adjacent rule

execution.canonical: event extreme plus 0.10 ATR15 stop, 1.50R target, 8h max hold
